0122212112002010001111022021020010101 - ASI: 25

Rules:
  01 = 0 * 1
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  20 = 2 * 0
  21 = 2 * 1
  22 = 2 * 2
  001 = 0 * 01
  020 = 0 * 20
  102 = 10 * 2
  211 = 2 * 11
  0101 = 01 * 01
  0122 = 01 * 22
  2021 = 20 * 21
  02001 = 020 * 01
  10001 = 10 * 001
  11102 = 11 * 102
  20020 = 20 * 020
  21211 = 21 * 211
  012221211 = 0122 * 21211
  020010101 = 02001 * 0101
  111022021 = 11102 * 2021
  2002010001 = 20020 * 10001
  111022021020010101 = 111022021 * 020010101
  0122212112002010001 = 012221211 * 2002010001
  0122212112002010001111022021020010101 = 0122212112002010001 * 111022021020010101
